subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses in truth unto a people that believe. He it is Who hath revealed the Book and sent forth the Messengers. Fear ye God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحان الذی نزل الایات بالحق لقوم یومنون هو الذی انزل الکتاب و ارسل الرسل ان اتقوا الله
subcodes.subjects: @Noah, @Moses, @Adam; Adam and Eve, @suffering and imprisonment, @Christ; Christianity, @high station of the true believer, @spiritual transformation, @justice and mercy
